ns0:entry.ns0:title: Logflare/logflare
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Logflare/logflare
Language: elixir
Never get surprised by a logging bill again. Centralized structured logging for Cloudflare, Vercel, Elixir and Javascript.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Simon-Initiative/oli-torus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Simon-Initiative/oli-torus
Language: elixir
Next Generation OLI Authoring and Delivery Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Spectral-Finance/lux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Spectral-Finance/lux
Language: elixir
Lux is an open-source framework for building multi-agent, swarmed intelligence built by Spectral Labs. With Beams, Prisms, Lenses, and Signals, it orchestrates AI-driven workflows to create truly autonomous organizations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ash-project/ash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ash-project/ash
Language: elixir
A declarative, extensible framework for building Elixir applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/beyond-all-reason/teiserver
Language: elixir

ns0:entry.ns0:title: edgehog-device-manager/edgehog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/edgehog-device-manager/edgehog
Language: elixir
Easily manage your IoT device fleet with Edgehog at once. Get information on device status, deploy updates, geolocate your devices and much more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elixir-lang/elixir
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elixir-lang/elixir

ns0:entry.ns0:title: santiment/sanbase2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/santiment/sanbase2
Language: elixir
The GraphQL API server https://api.santiment.net/graphiql. It powers the backend of Sanbase https://app.santiment.net. A python wrapper for the API is available at https://github.com/santiment/sanpy
